results.rendered_html:
sānubandha (2. sa + anu˚) adj. (f. ā)
1〉 ununterbrochen, fortwährend: saṃpadaḥ  RAGH. 1,64 . kalaha  SUŚR. 1,192,7 .
— 2〉 sammt dem was daran hängt, — dazu gehört: māṃsa  SUŚR. 1,56,15 . sānubandhā hatā hyasi  R. 2,7,28 . kaikeyīṃ ca vadhiṣyāmi sānubandhāṃ sabāndhavām 97,27 .
